prompt_en: We watched a movie after lunch.
The words are too small. I can't read them.
There is a dragonfly on my hand.
I eat lunch in the cafeteria every day.
I learned to play tennis today.
John is smart. He is good at math.
Ed is not stupid. He is very smart.
Oh no! I can't find my keys.
Dad reads the newspaper every day.
Lisa looked in the mirror and smiled.
Please put the meat in the freezer.
I keep my favorite food on this shelf.
